CustomField.formula: or( ispickval( ParticipationStatus__c ,'Registered'), ispickval( ParticipationStatus__c ,'Finished'), ispickval( ParticipationStatus__c ,'Arrived'), and(ispickval( ParticipationStatus__c ,'Cancelled'),ispickval( Cancellation_Reason__c ,'Security Forces')), and(ispickval( ParticipationStatus__c ,'Cancelled'),ispickval( Cancellation_Reason__c ,'Not Included in Second/Third Round')), and(ispickval( ParticipationStatus__c ,'Cancelled'),ispickval( Cancellation_Reason__c ,'Not Eligible - Family Circle')) )
CustomField.label: Mercchav can not register to anther prog
